microsoft_ft: Owned the **end-to-end growth roadmap** for Azure's resilience validation platform, scaling a 2-person operation into a self-serve system that sustained 45+ annual drills and drove **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling flows that reduced operational toil by **30%** — directly improving activation velocity and transitioning execution to a scalable, low-CAC delivery model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, shipping a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation loop that expanded LTV with enterprise partners.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ contract**, aligning GTM, engineering, and data teams around a shared success metric framework across organizational boundaries.

Accelerated growth capacity through **AI-driven automation**, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill throughput by 21%, freeing headcount to focus on higher-funnel product experiments.

Defined and tracked core success metrics — activation velocity, self-serve conversion rates, and operational efficiency ratios — enabling leadership to prioritize roadmap investments with quantitative confidence and model the compounding impact of each shipped iteration.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-powered code generation workflows by leading user demos and structured onboarding sessions, growing utilization across 14 key Azure teams and generating **37 engineering hours saved monthly** — modeling the activation funnel from lead to active user.

Shaped the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by synthesizing insights from 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, identifying critical feature gaps that directly mapped to retention risk and informed the next two quarters of prioritization decisions.

Improved self-serve efficiency and **data retrieval speed by 83%** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, reducing friction in the activation flow and compressing time-to-value for new users.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams, directly improving conversion from backlog to shipped capability at scale.

Executed a full discovery sprint with 20+ service teams to quantify 81 hours of manual toil per region launch, then built and socialized a phased roadmap to automate critical paths — reducing CAC for new region activations and establishing a repeatable **self-serve growth model**.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership the quantitative visibility needed to target automation gaps, model LTV impact of efficiency investments, and align GTM stakeholders around a data-driven prioritization strategy.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **migration strategy and dependency map** for a 2,000+ unit OS transition across 1,200+ stations, achieving zero operational downtime during the pilot — validating a self-serve rollout model that could scale without proportional increases in support overhead.

Prioritized a 40+ ticket backlog through Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, resolving high-severity issues that stabilized the developer intake process and improved **activation velocity** for engineering teams onboarding to the new platform environment.

Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders around automated CI/CD pipelines, **accelerating software deployment cycles by 25%** and establishing the cross-functional execution rhythm needed to ship fast, learn quickly, and iterate toward a scalable delivery model.
pro_painters: Increased job **bookings by 26%** by redesigning the end-to-end customer acquisition and conversion funnel — implementing a new CRM workflow that streamlined scoping, proposal generation, and invoicing across 200+ monthly leads and reduced friction at every handoff stage.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a data-informed, digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website experience and Google Business profile to improve organic lead quality and lower paid acquisition spend.

Modeled pricing and **profitability across 1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks and surface upsell opportunities, delivering a quantitative framework that improved leadership's monetization decisions and expanded LTV across recurring customer segments.
